name: Argo Blockchain plc 8.75% Senior Notes due 2026
summary: Argo Blockchain plc 8.75% Senior Notes due 2026 represents debt issued by Argo Blockchain, a cryptocurrency mining company, maturing in 2026. These notes represent a financial obligation of Argo Blockchain, with the company headquartered in London, UK. The notes provide investors with a fixed income stream in exchange for lending capital to the cryptocurrency mining operation.
